description: Led discovery, architecture, and delivery of Vesper's highest-impact enterprise feature - from problem framing through to production.
Diagnosed account sharing as a problem vector, wrote the RFC, and shipped 2FA end-to-end. Security posture improved and account sharing went down.
Rebuilt the caching and query layer in core dashboard controllers. Dashboards that used to take seconds now load in a fraction of the time; engagement on key flows went up 60%.
Designed and shipped role-based access control (RBAC) so we could sell team and enterprise tiers. The system became the foundation for premium pricing and upsells.
Shipped an internal tool that automated a manual, error-prone step in the claims pipeline. Cut intervention by 85% and freed the team to focus on edge cases that actually needed humans.
Drove ML accuracy and pipeline improvements for the claims product. The system could handle an order of magnitude more claims at the same quality bar.
Led product and growth strategy across a 3-year stretch of ARR growth. Owned roadmap, prioritization, and the link between what we built and what we measured.
Designed and built an emoji-to-movie guessing game. Users can create and share custom packs or play a daily challenge; the loop is built for replay and discovery.
Think my next achievement should be at your company? Get in touch.
